description: Monster visual and collision properties — animation components, light settings, hit testing, and display flags. Referenced by MonStatsEx column in MonStats.txt.

Id.description: Monster identifier, referenced by MonStatsEx column in MonStats.txt. Not read by 1.13c engine

Height.description: Monster height in pixels (used for overlay positioning)

overlayHeight.description: Overlay effect height offset in pixels

SizeX.description: Collision box X diameter in sub-tiles. Not read by 1.13c engine

SizeY.description: Collision box Y diameter in sub-tiles. Not read by 1.13c engine

spawnCol.description: Spawn collision mode (0 = normal, 1 = DS1 only, 2 = special)

BaseW.description: Base weapon class for attack animation. Not read by 1.13c engine

HitClass.description: Hit class for impact sound selection. Not read by 1.13c engine

HDv.description: Head component equipment graphic code. Not read by 1.13c engine

TRv.description: Torso component equipment graphic code. Not read by 1.13c engine

LGv.description: Legs component equipment graphic code. Not read by 1.13c engine

Rav.description: Right arm component equipment graphic code. Not read by 1.13c engine

Lav.description: Left arm component equipment graphic code. Not read by 1.13c engine

RHv.description: Right hand component equipment graphic code. Not read by 1.13c engine

LHv.description: Left hand component equipment graphic code. Not read by 1.13c engine

SHv.description: Shield component equipment graphic code. Not read by 1.13c engine

S1v.description: Special 1 component equipment graphic code. Not read by 1.13c engine

S2v.description: Special 2 component equipment graphic code. Not read by 1.13c engine

S4v.description: Special 4 component equipment graphic code. Not read by 1.13c engine

S6v.description: Special 6 component equipment graphic code. Not read by 1.13c engine

S7v.description: Special 7 component equipment graphic code. Not read by 1.13c engine

S8v.description: Special 8 component equipment graphic code. Not read by 1.13c engine

S8.description: Monster has special 8 component. Not read by 1.13c engine

TotalPieces.description: Total number of animation component pieces

mDT.description: Has Death animation mode. Not read by 1.13c engine

mNU.description: Has Neutral animation mode. Not read by 1.13c engine

mWL.description: Has Walk animation mode. Not read by 1.13c engine

mGH.description: Has Get Hit animation mode. Not read by 1.13c engine

mA1.description: Has Attack 1 animation mode. Not read by 1.13c engine

mA2.description: Has Attack 2 animation mode. Not read by 1.13c engine

mBL.description: Has Block animation mode. Not read by 1.13c engine

mSC.description: Has Cast animation mode. Not read by 1.13c engine

mS2.description: Has Skill 2 animation mode. Not read by 1.13c engine

mS3.description: Has Skill 3 animation mode. Not read by 1.13c engine

mS4.description: Has Skill 4 animation mode. Not read by 1.13c engine

dDT.description: Death animation direction count. Not read by 1.13c engine

dNU.description: Neutral animation direction count. Not read by 1.13c engine

dWL.description: Walk animation direction count. Not read by 1.13c engine

dGH.description: Get Hit animation direction count. Not read by 1.13c engine

dA2.description: Attack 2 animation direction count. Not read by 1.13c engine

dBL.description: Block animation direction count. Not read by 1.13c engine

dSC.description: Cast animation direction count. Not read by 1.13c engine

dS1.description: Skill 1 animation direction count. Not read by 1.13c engine

dS2.description: Skill 2 animation direction count. Not read by 1.13c engine

dS3.description: Skill 3 animation direction count. Not read by 1.13c engine

dS4.description: Skill 4 animation direction count. Not read by 1.13c engine

dKB.description: Knockback animation direction count. Not read by 1.13c engine

dRN.description: Run animation direction count. Not read by 1.13c engine

A1mv.description: Attack 1 can move (walking attack). Not read by 1.13c engine

A2mv.description: Attack 2 can move (walking attack). Not read by 1.13c engine

SCmv.description: Cast can move (walking cast). Not read by 1.13c engine

S1mv.description: Skill 1 can move. Not read by 1.13c engine

S2mv.description: Skill 2 can move. Not read by 1.13c engine

S3mv.description: Skill 3 can move. Not read by 1.13c engine

S4mv.description: Skill 4 can move. Not read by 1.13c engine

noGfxHitTest.description: Disable pixel-accurate hit testing, use bounding box only

htTop.description: Hit test bounding box top offset. Not read by 1.13c engine

htLeft.description: Hit test bounding box left offset. Not read by 1.13c engine

restore.description: Restore animation frames on mode change. Not read by 1.13c engine

noOvly.description: Do not draw overlays on this monster. Not read by 1.13c engine

alSel.description: Always selectable regardless of hostility. Not read by 1.13c engine

noSel.description: Monster is never selectable. Not read by 1.13c engine

shiftSel.description: Only selectable while holding Shift. Not read by 1.13c engine

corpseSel.description: Corpse is selectable (for revive/find item). Not read by 1.13c engine

revive.description: Monster can be revived by Necromancer. Not read by 1.13c engine

small.description: Uses small shadow. Not read by 1.13c engine

large.description: Uses large shadow. Not read by 1.13c engine

soft.description: Soft collision (can overlap other units). Not read by 1.13c engine

inert.description: Monster is inert (cannot be targeted or damaged). Not read by 1.13c engine

objCol.description: Uses object collision instead of monster collision. Not read by 1.13c engine

unflatDead.description: Corpse is not flattened on ground

Shadow.description: Monster casts a shadow. Not read by 1.13c engine

noUniqueShift.description: Disable unique monster color palette shift

compositeDeath.description: Use composite death animation (parts fly off). Not read by 1.13c engine

localBlood.description: Blood color (0 = none, 1 = blood, 2 = no blood)

Bleed.description: Blood effect type on hit. Not read by 1.13c engine

light-r.description: Light color red component (0-255). Not read by 1.13c engine

light-g.description: Light color green component (0-255). Not read by 1.13c engine

light-b.description: Light color blue component (0-255). Not read by 1.13c engine

Utrans.description: Color palette transform index (Normal difficulty). Not read by 1.13c engine

Utrans(N).description: Color palette transform index (Nightmare difficulty). Not read by 1.13c engine

Utrans(H).description: Color palette transform index (Hell difficulty). Not read by 1.13c engine

Heart.description: Heart item drop (broken since 1.07, unused). Not read by 1.13c engine

BodyPart.description: Body part item drop (broken since 1.07, unused). Not read by 1.13c engine

InfernoAnim.description: Animation mode used for inferno effect

ResurrectMode.description: Animation mode token used when resurrected

EOL.description: End of line marker (not loaded by game). Not read by 1.13c engine
